## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Paper correction (typo, grammar, clarity)
- [ ] Factual correction (wrong number, wrong citation)
- [ ] Reproducibility improvement (script, install, documentation)
- [ ] Bibliography update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] The paper still compiles (`pdflatex main.tex` locally or workflow passes)
- [ ] `scripts/reproduce.sh` still passes (if change touches numeric claims)
- [ ] I have signed my commits with a real name and email
- [ ] The change is focused (one topic per PR)
- [ ] If factual, I have cited a source in the PR description
